overall.description: Nighttime driving gameplay footage through a fictionalized New Orleans-style city (Mafia III). The player navigates a vintage vehicle through residential and commercial streets, stopping at traffic lights and intersections. The scene features historic buildings with wrought iron balconies, palm trees, and 1960s-era cars under street lamp illumination.

ornate black street lamps illuminating the road
mature trees with dense canopies lining both sidewalks

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises down a quiet residential street at night. Historic homes with distinctive balconies line both sides, illuminated by warm street lamps. Mature oak trees create dense shadows along the sidewalks.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a red car down the main road, stopping at a red traffic light. After the light turns green, it proceeds through the intersection as a police car passes by from the left. The surroundings feature a mix of commercial buildings and street lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a nighttime city, transitioning from a quiet residential neighborhood into a bustling commercial district. It begins by cruising down a residential street lined with historic homes and oak trees cast in deep shadows under warm street lamps. As the vehicle reaches an intersection, it turns right and halts at a red light, waiting for a pedestrian to cross before proceeding toward the glow of a Deluxe store and towering palm trees. The scene then shifts into the historic commercial district, weaving past classic balconies and turning left at a stop sign to follow the line of architecture. Finally, the camera tracks a red car down a main road, pausing at one last traffic light before accelerating through the intersection as a police car passes by under the bright city lights.
